extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports, against the Bank, 19 criminal proceedings, 25 tax proceedings, 1 statutory/regulatory proceeding and 1 material civil litigation; the corresponding “By the Bank” rows (11,604 criminal, Nil tax, 2,051 statutory/regulatory, and 3 civil) were excluded, as were all promoter/director rows because they are Nil. The quantified aggregate amount against the Bank is the table’s stated aggregate of ₹927.13 million, including the tax proceedings, rather than a separately summed figure; converted at ₹10 million per crore, this is ₹92.713 crore. The contingent-liabilities table provides a stated consolidated Total of ₹1,036.58 million as at September 30, 2023, converted to ₹103.658 crore; this stated Total was used without re-summing. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the source monetary unit is ₹ in millions, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
